title: geigeria plumosa subsp. angustifolia
intro: Geigeria plumosa subsp. angustifolia, also known as Geigeria, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Geigeria include the potential reduction of fever, relief from pain, and treatment of various skin conditions. Geigeria is often prepared into herbal teas or infusions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and benefits.
